response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned entire video (00:00-04:56). 2. Observed video content: A continuous slideshow of fan art and messages dedicated to Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis' 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. 3. Evaluated audio: Continuous instrumental background music throughout. No vocal performance detected. 4. Concluded no vocal songs are present, thus no lyrics are required.
response.global_summary: A video compilation featuring fan messages and artwork, created by the community to congratulate Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis on their 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. The video is accompanied by instrumental background music.

scenes.description: A continuous slideshow featuring various fan art, personal messages of support, and concert merchandise information for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. Instrumental background music plays throughout.
